title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Google India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Google India:
Google India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India!
